description_long: This is a modern bungalow set within a fenced rectangular plot, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist architectural style. The structure is primarily white with large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a contemporary aesthetic. The property includes a spacious backyard with a swimming pool, sun loungers, and a patio area for outdoor relaxation. The front of the bungalow has a driveway leading to an attached garage, and the landscaping includes a few trees and shrubs for added greenery. The perimeter is enclosed by a blue-tinted fence, ensuring privacy and security. The overall design emphasizes open spaces, clean lines, and functional outdoor living areas.
description: A modern, flat-roofed white bungalow with large windows, a backyard pool, patio, and attached garage, all enclosed by a blue fence. The design is minimalist with open outdoor spaces and contemporary landscaping.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, attached garage, main entrance, and landscaped front yard with shrubs.
description_view_1: Side/rear view highlighting the backyard patio, swimming pool, sun loungers, and a large tree near the fence.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the pool, patio area, and extensive green lawn, with the house's large windows facing the backyard.
description_view_3: Side/front view showing the garage, driveway, and a tree-lined side yard, with the pool and patio visible in the background.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
